phases.label: Gather Preferences
phases.description: Collect travel requirements from the user (destination, dates, budget, group info, interests, etc.)

phases.label: Shortlist Destinations
phases.description: Research and shortlist 8-10 destinations matching the user's preferences

phases.label: Select Destinations
phases.description: Present the shortlisted destinations and let the user choose which ones to explore

phases.label: Research Experiences
phases.description: Find activities and experiences at the selected destinations that match preferences

phases.label: Plan Itinerary
phases.description: Build a day-by-day itinerary slotting places and activities

phases.label: Research Accommodation & Flights
phases.description: Research places to stay and flight options for the trip

phases.label: Final Plan
phases.description: Present the complete, detailed travel plan with all details

destinationResearch.name: Athens
destinationResearch.description: The cradle of Western civilization. Visit the Acropolis and the Parthenon to bring Greek myths to life for your son. The Plaka district is great for walking.

destinationResearch.name: Crete
destinationResearch.description: Greece's largest island. Visit the Palace of Knossos (the Minotaur's labyrinth!) and relax at Elafonisi beach with its pink sand and shallow water.
Famous for its long, sandy, and shallow beaches—perfect for a 4-year-old. The 'Portara' (Temple of Apollo) is a stunning mythological landmark.
destinationResearch.name: Naxos

destinationResearch.description: A romantic and historic town. It's a great base to visit the ancient theater of Epidaurus and the ruins of Mycenae (King Agamemnon's home).
destinationResearch.name: Nafplio

destinationResearch.description: Step into a fairy tale in the Medieval Old Town. The Colossus of Rhodes (one of the Seven Wonders) has deep mythological roots.
destinationResearch.name: Rhodes

destinationResearch.description: Stunning views and unique history. Explore Akrotiri, a prehistoric city preserved in volcanic ash, often linked to the myth of Atlantis.
destinationResearch.name: Santorini
Corfu
destinationResearch.description: Known as the 'Emerald Island'. Visit the Achilleion Palace, themed after Achilles, and enjoy the family-friendly Paleokastritsa beaches.

destinationResearch.name: Pelion
destinationResearch.description: Mythology says this was the summer home of the Gods and the land of the Centaurs. Beautiful combination of mountain villages and beaches.

destinationResearch.name: Delphi & Galaxidi
destinationResearch.description: The 'Navel of the World'. The ruins of Delphi are epic, and nearby Galaxidi offers a quiet seaside escape with calm waters.

destinationResearch.name: Kos
destinationResearch.description: Visit the Asklepion (ancient hospital of Hippocrates) and enjoy the island's many flat, sandy beaches and bicycle paths.
